summary: Monthly/yearly subscriber live game in market - Feed Select modal
description:
GIVEN the user is a monthly/yearly subscriber
AND there is a game scheduled or in-progress in the viewing market of the user
AND/OR the game level blackedOutVideo equals true in MASTepg
AND MASTepg has game level videoStatusCodes equal to 1
AND the game is not a partner game

steps.action: WHEN the user selects the game tile with a Blackout pill
steps.result:
THEN video feed buttons are not displayed
AND a title displays with text "_Stream On: <Partner Service>_" (driven by content restrictions)
AND the following blackout messaging is displayed in the Feed Select modal: "_This broadcast is available to watch exclusively on <Broadcast Partner Name>. Please download from your device app store to watch now or visit [link tbd] to learn more. Archives will be available 90 minutes after the end of the game._"
OR a "Where to Watch" message is displayed letting the user know where/how they are able to watch the game
AND the following title text displays "Full Game Access"
AND an [Upgrade Plan] button is displayed below "Full Game Access"
